headline: CooperVision Skater Partnership Puts MyDay Energys And Growth Story In Focus
summary: CooperVision Canada has partnered with Olympic speed skater Valérie Maltais to promote its MyDay Energys contact lenses and eye health awareness. The collaboration focuses on the demands of active lifestyles and the role of vision care in everyday performance and comfort. For readers tracking Cooper Companies (NasdaqGS:COO), this marketing move comes with the shares at about $69.46. The stock has seen a 14.4% decline year to date and a 32.1% decline over five years.
